title: Update employee-mapping.service.ts with currentEmpCode resolution
description: Add methods to resolve currentEmpCode from NIK lookup, add status cascade for current_mapping_status

files.change: Add currentEmpCode resolution methods and status cascade

implementation: Add loadHREmployeeSnapshot() method to cache hr_employee_current_snapshot in memory
Add resolveFromParsedCode(parsedCode: string, nik: string | null): Promise<ResolutionResult>
Implement status cascade: MAPPED_CURRENT > PARSED_ONLY > PARSED_CODE_NOT_FOUND_IN_HR > NIK_NOT_FOUND > CURRENT_EMP_NOT_FOUND > NIK_DUPLICATE_AMBIGUOUS > NEED_REVIEW_CURRENT
Add type CurrentEmpCodeResult: { empCode: string, empName: string, status: string, method: string, reason: string }
Update convertDeviceUserIdToEmpCodeWithLookup to include current resolution

reference.examples: Existing loadAllEmployeeCodes() pattern for in-memory caching

criteria: New methods added with proper TypeScript types

interfaces.name: CurrentEmpCodeResult
interfaces.definition: { empCode: string, empName: string, status: MappingStatus, method: ResolutionMethod, reason: string }

functions.purpose: Resolve current employee code from NIK

manual_checks: Test status cascade with various edge cases
success_metrics: New unit tests for currentEmpCode resolution
